title: Gemma 4 Stage A/B automation
goal: Automate Gemma 4 baseline and single-layer sweep campaigns for challenger profile generation.
constraints: Record model revision and dataset version in outputs.
Keep sweep config reproducible and seed-controlled.
Output artifacts must be ingestible by gate checker.
verify_command: pnpm run sweep:gemma4:stageA && pnpm run sweep:gemma4:stageB
definition_of_done: Stage A baseline run completes with reproducible config.
Stage B single-layer sweep emits per-layer quality metrics.
Results include challenger profile candidates for Stage C.
rollback_note: If sweep automation fails, pause Gemma 4 promotion work and keep Gemma 3 champion profile active.
